Not able to reply to the post as fb doesn't allow me.

Arun kumar is from JNU a left citadel. What can u expect from leftists except negativity and dire predictions. Arun kumar is still an unknown fellow u can ask Nobel Laureates like Amartya Sen and Abhijit Banerjee or the poster boy economist raghu ram rajan and they will gv u lot of bad news. All r sold and have agenda and not reliable. Sad but true
